creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to velcroleaf from comment #0)
> The original port maintainer is no longer maintaining the port.

Since when?
Maintained by: neil@darlow.co.uk 

Did he tell you he let the port go?  He's still listed as maintainer.  


If the only purpose of the PR is to tell us that there's a newer version available then I might as well close the PR now (the PR system is not to be used for these reminders).

Somebody needs to provide a tested patch to update it (either the listed maintainer or someone else)
